_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: DhhCre activates EGFP expression in the context of DhhCre Nf1 mice in 40–50% of SCs, in a reporter mouse in which the fl/fl CMV-β actin promoter and loxP flanked CAT gene are upstream of the Egfp cassette
details: Activates EGFP expression in 40-50% of Schwann cells in the context of DhhCre Nf1 mice
